# experiments.singer_ensemble_experiment { #tspaint.experiments.singer_ensemble_experiment }

```python
tspaint.experiments.singer_ensemble_experiment(
    T_admix=300.0,
    n_admix=12,
    n_ref=12,
    sequence_length=80000.0,
    recombination_rate=1e-08,
    Ne=1000,
    T_split=5000.0,
    f_A=0.5,
    mutation_rate=2.5e-07,
    seed=1,
    max_iter=6,
    n_singer=20,
    thin=8,
    burn_in=6,
    singer_seed=42,
    Q0=None,
)
```

Merge LAI across **SINGER posterior** ARG samples vs. a single sample vs. truth.

The §7.4 test: genuine posterior draws (thinned -> independent-ish errors) should
make merging help, unlike the correlated tsinfer ensemble
(:func:`arg_ensemble_experiment`). Requires the SINGER binary (env ``TSPAINT_SINGER``
or :mod:`tspaint.io_singer`'s default path).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**T_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**n_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**n_ref**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**sequence_length**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**recombination_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**Ne**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**T_split**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**f_A**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [300.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**mutation_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2.5e-07]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Mutation rate for the sites SINGER consumes.

<code>[**seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Random seed for simulation and mutations.

<code>[**max_iter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [6]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Maximum EM iterations.

<code>[**n_singer**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [20]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of SINGER posterior samples to draw.

<code>[**thin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [8]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   SINGER MCMC thinning interval and burn-in.

<code>[**burn_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [8]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   SINGER MCMC thinning interval and burn-in.

<code>[**singer_seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [42]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Seed passed to the SINGER binary.

<code>[**Q0**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Initial generator (defaults to a symmetric ``1e-3`` 2-state generator).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``M`` (realised number of samples), ``n_haplotypes``, ``n_sites``, ``single_balanced_mean``/``_std``/``_per_member``, ``merged_balanced``, ``merged_confidence``, ``merged_reliability``, ``true_balanced``, and the ``merged_tracks``, ``truth_states``, ``queries``.
